---
title: "About Me"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
---

I'm a PhD physiologist with expertise in real-world data (RWD) analysis and evidence generation. My work bridges the gap between clinical research and practical applications, helping to translate complex physiological concepts into actionable insights.

I'm passionate about leveraging data to solve problems in healthcare, and I bring a strong scientific foundation combined with analytical rigor. Beyond my professional work, I'm an avid musician and footgolf enthusiast—two hobbies that help me maintain balance and creativity.

On this site, you'll find projects showcasing my work in data analysis, machine learning applications in healthcare, and other topics I'm exploring. Feel free to reach out if you'd like to collaborate or discuss RWD methodologies.
